_comment: This file is auto-generated by auth.py — do not create it manually.
_steps: 1. Make sure credentials.json exists (see credentials_placeholder.json for setup)
3. A browser window will open — log in and grant permissions
4. token.json will be created automatically in this directory
5. The bot will silently refresh this token as needed while running
_note: token.json is gitignored. If you lose it, just run python auth.py again.
